data.notice_text:
REQUEST FOR EXPRESSIONS OF INTEREST (REOI)

Project Name:                                   Sindh Human Capital Investment: 1000 days Integrated Health and Population Program

Administrative Department:             Health Department, Government of Sindh.

Country:                                            Pakistan.

Assignment:                                       Selection of Individual Consultants

Credit No.                                          IDA72370

Project ID No:                                    P178530

The Program Management Unit at Sindh Human Capital Investment: 1000 Days Integrated Health & Population Program invites eligible individuals to express their interest in providing the below mentioned services.

Position

Qualification

Experience

1.  Data Processing Officer

No. of Position 01

 

Reference No.

PK-SIHPP-559511-CS-INDV

 

Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Data Science, Statistics, or a related field.

 

  • Minimum 3 years of experience 
  • Strong proficiency in SQL, Python, or R for data analysis.
  • Experience with the MERN stack is a plus.
  • Experience with ETL tools and data integration.
  • Hands-on experience with data visualization tools like Power BI, Tableau, or Google
  • Data Studio
  • Knowledge of statistical analysis and predictive modeling techniques.
  • Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
  • Familiarity with healthcare data is a plus

 

2. Networking Officer

No. of Position 01

 

Reference No.

PK-SIHPP-559521-CS-INDV

 

 

Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Network Engineering, or related field.

  • 2-3 years of experience is preferred in networking and software development.
  • Proficiency in networking protocols and technologies (TCP/IP, DNS, VPN, etc.).
  • Experience with the MORN stack is preferred.
  • Basic coding skills in languages such as Python, JavaScript, or PHP.
  • Familiarity with network security practices.
  • Good problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
  • Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment

Interested individual consultants must provide: A detailed, dated and signed Curriculum Vitae highlighting qualifications and experience in carrying out similar assignments, as well as references for possible checks.

The attention of interested Consultants is drawn to Section III, paragraphs, 3.14, 3.16, and 3.17 of the World Bank’s “Procurement Regulations for IPF Borrowers” 2020 [revised Sept 2025] (“Procurement Regulations”), setting forth the World Bank’s policy on conflict of interest.

The Consultants will be selected in accordance with the Open Competitive Selection of Individual Consultants method set out in the Procurement Regulations of the World Bank for IPF  2020 Revised September 2025.

Further information can be obtained at the address below during office hours i.e. 10:00 to 16:00 hours local time from Monday to Friday.

The detailed Terms of References (TORs) can be obtained from the office (address given below) or can be downloaded by clicking on the link  www.sihpp.gos.pk/career.php Expressions of interest (CVs and other supporting documents) must be delivered in a written form to the address below (in person, by mail, or by e-mail) on or before 7th July 2026 at 16:00 Hours.

Initial Contract Period shall be tentatively period of 11 months and it shall be extendable based on the performance and requirement of the project.

Program Management Unit at Sindh Human Capital Investment: 1000 Days Integrated Health & Population Program reserves the right to accept or reject any application. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted by Project Implementation Unit -SIHPP.

 

Program Director (SIHPP)

Office # 201, Plot # 180-C. Al Murtaza Commercial Lane 2, Phase 8 DHA, Karachi South

Tel: 021-33406145, 021-33406360
